name: Public secret to customer data path
objective: Use leaked CI deployment authority to reach the customer data subnet.
blast_radius: Potential write path into payment workloads and read path toward customer data services.
safe_validation_method: Token was validated in a sandboxed runner; network reachability was confirmed through graph analysis.

steps.title: Acquire deployment token
steps.validation: Secret scanner and access review confirmed active deployment scope.
steps.control_gap: No automatic revocation for public-code secret exposure.

steps.title: Run deployment workflow
steps.validation: Sandbox confirmed token can trigger deployment workflow actions.
steps.control_gap: Runner permissions are broader than the scoped service boundary.

steps.title: Reach production data subnet
steps.validation: Cloud graph shows CI-to-data-subnet path through inherited security group.
steps.control_gap: Segmentation policy does not separate build infrastructure from production data plane.

name: Privileged SSO compromise to payment operations
objective: Compromise an admin session and alter payment operations configuration.
blast_radius: Privileged identity compromise could affect payment admin portals and deployment approvals.
safe_validation_method: Policy review and tabletop emulation; no live credential capture performed.

steps.title: Phish privileged contractor
steps.validation: MFA policy allows push approval for the affected group.
steps.control_gap: Privileged identities are not uniformly bound to phishing-resistant MFA.

steps.title: Approve privileged session
steps.validation: Tabletop confirmed approval chain relies on identity group membership.
steps.control_gap: No compensating device trust requirement for contractors.
